success.requirements: Commander: squad_leads_launched == 50 AND workers_launched == 250. Workers never write success — they write done.

done.requirements: Work completed, result JSON written atomically with summary <= 500 words.
done.note: Monitor treats done and success as equivalent for display (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:349)

triggers: Commander: full 250-worker launch blocked by circuit breaker, timeout, or cost ceiling
Commander: child launch falls back to banned model
Orchestrator: all agents dead but only some tasks completed (done_count > 0 and < TOTAL_TASKS) after 15s grace
partial.not_a_percentage: No percentage thresholds — commander requires exact counts; orchestrator uses any-done vs all-done.

triggers.commander: Zero Squad Leads launched OR Copilot CLI process failed to start (bin/stampede.sh:985-986)
triggers.task: max_generation exceeded (cap=2) OR agent wrote status=error (skills/SKILL.md:509-511)

failed.recovery: Tasks requeued with generation++ up to max_generation=2; after cap, marked failed permanently.

error.note: Written by stampede-agent on unhandled exception. Treated as failed by orchestrator synthesis (skills/SKILL.md:615).

running.explicit_in_json: Yes, in commander swarm-state.json only (not worker result files).
running.task_level_proxy: claimed/ directory presence = in-progress. Monitor shows RUNNING when claimed > 0.
running.worker_level: Determined by tmux pane liveness (pane_dead != 1) — not a JSON field.

used_by: commander swarm-state.json initial write by launcher

running_state_detection.task_level: Presence of file in claimed/ directory represents a task being worked on.
running_state_detection.agent_level: tmux pane liveness check (primary): pane_dead == 1 means dead. PID files (pids/*.pid) are secondary.
running_state_detection.note: Monitor prefers tmux pane state over stored PIDs (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:218-220). Skill still uses PID heartbeat via kill -0.

crash_recovery.requeue_logic: Claimed tasks with no result and no live agents moved back to queue/ after ORPHAN_RECOVERY_AFTER (180s)
crash_recovery.final_state_on_exhaustion: failed result written to results/ by skill dead-worker recovery (skills/SKILL.md:515-521)

key_distinctions: Workers use done/error; commanders use success/partial/failed — they are different status namespaces
running is explicit only in commander swarm-state.json; for worker tasks it is implicit via claimed/ directory
partial requires nonzero work done; failed means zero Squad Leads or task retry exhausted
Monitor accepts both done and success as completion (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:349)
Merger only processes branches where worker status == done (bin/stampede-merge.sh:92)
500-word cap is enforced in code; no minimum word requirement for success
Ad-hoc synthesis labels (CLEAN, COMPLETE, GAPS_FOUND, etc.) in atom JSON are not part of the formal status contract

sources.agents/stampede-commander.agent.md: Commander status contract (success/partial/failed), launch proof requirements
sources.bin/stampede.sh: Commander init (starting), failed on launch error, bundle status constraint
sources.bin/stampede-monitor.sh: Stuck/orphan thresholds, tmux-based liveness, partial completion logic
sources.skills/SKILL.md: Task SQL statuses, run SQL statuses, dead-worker recovery, generation cap
